description_long: This is a modern, multi-story urban house with a flat roof and clean, geometric lines. The facade is predominantly white, featuring large rectangular and arched windows, and a mix of balcony and terrace spaces adorned with potted plants. The front entryway is set back from a paved area, flanked by a row of tall, slender trees and a palm, providing privacy and greenery. A prominent external staircase runs along one side, connecting the ground and upper floors, while the rear and side boundaries are defined by a combination of solid and slatted fencing. The house includes multiple outdoor living areas, such as balconies and a rooftop terrace, enhancing its contemporary appeal. The overall design emphasizes simplicity, functionality, and integration with outdoor elements.
description: A modern, multi-story white house with flat roof, large windows, balconies, and lush landscaping. Features include external stairs, paved entry, and a mix of privacy fencing and greenery.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main entrance, arched and rectangular windows, a paved entry, and a row of tall trees with a palm to the left.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the long external staircase, multiple doors, and balcony access, with minimal window openings.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the fenced backyard, tall trees, and a rooftop terrace, with balconies and windows visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view shows the full length of the privacy fence, dense greenery, and balcony spaces, with fewer visible windows.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with a mix of large and small windows, including an arched feature window
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main door with a paved approach, no porch, flanked by tall trees and minimal decorative elements
